title: maianthemum canadense var. ovale
intro: Maianthemum canadense var. ovale, also known as Canadian mayapple var. oval-leaved, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Asaraceae family, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Maianthemum canadense var. ovale include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or oil, and it is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves.
